(5) In the final phase, the music continues as the vocal asks a direct question to the audience.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a collage of a woman outdoors, showing her skin in poor condition. (2) She transitions to a side-by-side comparison of her face from early September to late September, highlighting a clear improvement in skin texture and brightness. (3) The main character speaks directly to the camera in a variety of indoor settings, including what looks like a living room and a professional-looking room for skin testing. (4) Detailed close-up shots show the woman's face, focusing on her pores and the smoothness of her skin. (5) She is seen in a clinic-like environment where a technician uses a handheld device to measure her skin quality. (6) The woman displays several sachets of 'nippi' collagen and a bottle of 'Relove' Lipo VitC capsules. (7) She demonstrates opening a sachet and consuming the product, as well as pouring the collagen powder into a bowl. (8) A laptop screen displays scientific graphs and skin scans showing a 196.4% increase in collagen density and a decrease in pore size. (9) The video concludes with the woman giving a thumbs-up and showing off her glowing skin in various casual outfits.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat background music starts immediately with a fast tempo. (2) A female voice speaks in an excited and energetic tone, narrating her skin journey. (3) Occasional 'ding' and 'sparkling' sound effects emphasize key points and visual transitions. (4) During the skin test phase, there is a brief interaction with another person, though the main narration remains dominant. (5) The music remains consistent in its cheerful and fast-paced style throughout the entire duration until it fades out at the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '以前出外景...皮膚真的慘到不行' (Decorative: Recalling poor past skin condition with a frustrated tone). (2) '9月7日 -> 9月21日' (Functional: Marking the chronological progress of the skin experiment). (3) '素顏也很扛打' (Hook: Emphasizing skin looks good even without makeup). (4) '實測15天' (Functional: Describing the duration of the trial). (5) '膠原來自日本大牌' (Functional: Highlighting the quality of the 'nippi' brand). (6) '增加吸收率', '合成膠原蛋白' (Functional: Explaining the benefits of Lipo VitC). (7) '膠原蛋白量 UP 196.4%' (Functional: Presenting scientific data to prove efficacy).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Problem -> Transformation -> Scientific Testing -> Product Breakdown -> Data Proof -> Final Recommendation

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with vibrant pink hair, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt and a denim mini-skirt, stands in front of a giant $100 bill poster, gesturing excitedly while speaking. (2) The scene shifts to the exterior of the Chiayi Huanxi Caishen Temple, where she stands with her arms wide open. (3) She proceeds through various temple activities: tossing colorful crescent-shaped blocks (moon blocks) on a Bagua-patterned floor, praying with incense sticks before a golden dragon statue, ringing a large bronze bell which startles her, and vigorously beating a symbolic 'villain' paper figure with a wooden bat. (4) She continues the tour by showing spirit money, waving a large feathered fan in a stylized dance, and applying small heart-shaped stickers to a gold-painted statue. (5) Finally, she demonstrates a ritual at a fountain, pouring water over a gold ingot-shaped vessel, before returning to the front of the temple to wave goodbye to the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with upbeat, high-tempo pop music featuring a steady electronic beat. A young female voice speaks in an energetic, high-pitched, and fast-paced tone. (2) As she moves through the temple, the soundscape is punctuated by various sound effects (SFX): a sharp 'ding' for text highlights, the resonant metallic clang of a large bell, the rhythmic thudding of a wooden bat hitting a table, and the splashing of water. (3) The background music remains continuous but occasionally lowers in volume to emphasize her direct address to the camera or the specific sounds of the temple rituals. (4) Towards the end, the music swells slightly as she delivers a concluding message, ending with a cheerful goodbye and the ambient sounds of the temple exterior.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Subtitles appear at the bottom throughout the video, translating the speaker's Mandarin dialogue into written characters. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '求財百分百 就是要發財' (100% seeking wealth, just want to get rich) appears at the start in large, bold yellow characters with a blue outline to hook the viewer. (3) Location Identification: '嘉義 歡喜財神廟' (Chiayi Huanxi Caishen Temple) is displayed prominently as she enters the temple. (4) Step-by-step labels: '天地人 三財杯 擲杯區' (Heaven, Earth, Man Three Fortune Cups Divination Area) and '爆打小人!' (Beat the villain!) appear in variety-show style graphics to explain the ongoing activities.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Multi-activity Temple Tour -> Call to Action/Outro

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman wearing a white lace top and a straw hat stands in a brick-paved courtyard, smiling at the camera. (2) The scene shifts to focus on several large, ornate bronze bells hanging on a wooden frame; a hand enters the frame and strikes a bell with a mallet. (3) The woman holds a smartphone showing a musical tuner app, listening intently to the bell's resonance and nodding. (4) She correctly identifies the notes of multiple bells in sequence, reacting with increasing excitement, jumping, and raising her fist in celebration while another woman watches from the side.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice speaks in an upbeat, conversational tone in Mandarin Chinese against a background of outdoor ambient noise. (2) Each time a bell is struck, a deep, resonant, and lingering metallic percussion sound dominates the audio. (3) The woman is heard humming or singing the notes ("La~ La~") to match the bells, followed by her calling out the note names like "A" or "G". (4) High-pitched electronic dinging sound effects are heard whenever she gets a note right, accompanied by her cheering and laughing.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) "當你有一個絕對音感的朋友" (When you have a friend with perfect pitch) - Hook text. (2) "降Si吧？ (P#Si = Bb)" - Functional text explaining the musical note. (3) "正確x1", "正確x2", "正確x3" - Sequential decorative text counting her correct guesses. (4) "不可能降Si&降La都聽得出來欸！" (Impossible that you can distinguish B-flat and A-flat!) - Emotional decorative text. (5) "你可不可以不要什麼都會啊！" (Can you please not be good at everything!) - Playful closing hook.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a woman in a large navy 'New York Nets' sweater standing in a doorway of a room. She smiles, gestures playfully, and talks to someone off-camera. (2) After a quick cut, she re-enters the room dressed as Chucky, featuring messy orange hair, striped shirt, and overalls with fake blood on her face. She brandishes a kitchen spatula and performs a manic dance. (3) The scene shifts to her re-entering in a white oversized shirt with braided pigtails and pink cheek makeup. She holds a small portable light and a purple rose, acting in a 'cute' but slightly eerie manner. (4) The final sequence shows her crouched on a small black tricycle, dressed as Billy the Puppet from 'Saw', with a bald cap, black hair, and red spiral cheek makeup. She attempts to ride the tricycle, falls over comically, and struggles to get up while laughing with a person whose hands briefly appear to help her.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with an upbeat, lighthearted BGM. A cheerful female voice speaks in Chinese, sounding playful and inviting. (2) The music shifts to a suspenseful, horror-themed track. The female voice becomes high-pitched and emits manic, Chucky-style laughter. (3) The BGM changes to a soft, bell-like 'cute' melody. The female voice adopts a sweet, slightly exaggerated tone. (4) A dark, mechanical, and distorted male-like voice effect is applied to her speech, mimicking the Jigsaw character. The iconic 'Saw' theme music plays. As she falls, the audio transitions to natural laughter and conversation between the woman and a male off-screen voice (Jun-ting). Ambient sounds include the rattling of the tricycle and the thud of the fall.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook text: 'POV: 我以為的萬聖節' (My expected Halloween). (2) Functional text subtitles: '寶貝~~' (Baby), '今年萬聖節要不要來玩一些特別的呀!' (Do you want to play something special this Halloween?), '我有準備!' (I'm prepared!). (3) Decorative text: '我要煮了你' (I'll cook you), '???', '怎樣!!' (What!!), '不開心喔?' (Not happy?). (4) Functional text for Saw segment: 'I want to play a game!', 'You can make a choice!', '俊廷~' (Jun-ting), '你要買包包給我?' (Do you want to buy me a bag?). (5) Contextual note: '(場面一度混亂)' (The scene is chaotic), '救命啊!' (Help!).

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Expectation -> Reality Costume 1 -> Reality Costume 2 -> Reality Costume 3 (Fail)
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To entertain the audience with a humorous 'Expectation vs. Reality' Halloween costume showcase. The video utilizes popular horror culture references (Chucky, Saw) and contrasts them with a flirtatious/cute opening to create a comedic subversion of expectations, ending with a relatable 'behind-the-scenes' moment where the creator falls off her prop.
